title: antitoxicum scandens
intro: Antitoxicum scandens, a climbing plant native to tropical Asia, is known for its medicinal properties and is also referred to as the poison tree due to its toxic nature. The plant's milky sap has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Antitoxicum scandens include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's sap can be extracted and used to create topical creams, ointments, and tinctures that can be applied directly to the affected area.
